since_last: 7% of 86 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.21%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 7% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.37% · BTC -1.79% · Gold -1.44% · Nasdaq100 -0.19%. 7% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.21%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.21%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -5.05%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: INTC is the standout at -7.76%
cards.body: Leaders: CRNC +4.92%, IBM +3.28%, SAP +1.85%, D +1.63%, FTNT +0.80%. Laggards: INTC -7.76%, MU -7.73%, ASML -7.24%, MRVL -7.10%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.21% at $151.18
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.21% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
